title: VPN keeps disconnecting
description: User reports VPN keeps disconnecting and they cannot access company apps.

title: Suspicious email received
description: User received an email with an unexpected link asking them to verify their password.

title: Cannot sign into Microsoft 365
description: User cannot sign into Microsoft 365 after a password change.

title: Laptop storage almost full
description: User reports laptop is showing low disk space warnings.

title: Password reset policy question
description: User wants to know the company password reset policy and expiry rules.
